package rulecoverage

func NegativeRedisClientCreatedPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "redis_client_created_per_request"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Redis clients created per request instead of reused as shared process infrastructure."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
